agents.name: Orchestrator
agents.role: Central coordination, task routing, agent lifecycle management.

agents.name: Frontend Build
agents.role: React/Next.js components, Tailwind styling, responsive layouts, game UI.

agents.name: Backend Build
agents.role: Node.js/Express API routes, middleware, PM2 processes.

agents.name: Blockchain
agents.role: Solidity contracts, Hardhat deployment, Etherscan verification, XRPL integration.

agents.name: Security
agents.role: Auth flows, wallet security, API security, access controls.
agents.note: Security changes require Dr. Meg approval before deployment.

agents.name: Database
agents.role: PostgreSQL schema, migrations, query optimization, backup verification.

agents.name: Testing
agents.role: End-to-end test design, integration testing, contract test suites.

agents.name: DevOps
agents.role: VPS management, PM2, Cloudflare tunnel, DNS, Vercel deployments.

agents.name: Documentation
agents.role: Technical docs, API references, architecture diagrams, session summaries.

agents.name: Governance
agents.role: Compliance docs, consent framework, regulatory analysis, ToS/Privacy.
agents.note: Legal/compliance changes require Dr. Meg review.

agents.name: Content Engine
agents.role: Multi-platform content generation and distribution (Discord, Telegram, Bluesky, Mastodon, Dev.to).

agents.name: Analytics
agents.role: On-chain analytics, engagement metrics, dashboard data feeds.

agents.name: Approval Gate
agents.role: Governance and approval router for the agent council.

agents.name: Academic
agents.role: Research documentation, LOI/CV maintenance, faculty engagement, publication prep.

agents.name: Web3 Wallet
agents.role: Monitors wallet activity, token balances, and on-chain session attestations.

agents.name: Web3 Marketing
agents.role: Community growth, partnership outreach, ecosystem positioning.

agents.name: IPFS
agents.role: Content pinning, CID management, off-chain storage integrity.
